headline: MetLife Investment Management Originates $26 Billion in Private Fixed Income Transactions in 2025
summary: WHIPPANY, N.J., April 09, 2026--MetLife Investment Management (MIM), the institutional asset management business of MetLife, Inc. (NYSE: MET), today announced that it originated approximately $26 billion in private fixed income transactions for clients in 2025, increasing total assets under management on MIM’s private fixed income platform to $144.7 billion as of December 31, 2025.1

headline: What to Expect From MetLife's Q1 2026 Earnings Report
summary: MetLife will release its first-quarter earnings soon, and analysts anticipate a double-digit bottom-line growth.
